title: Admin - Reject Vendor Application - Functional Test Plan
author: QA Automation
overview: Functional testing of the Admin Reject Vendor Application feature on the AT/AD Admin Portal. Covers Reject button visibility (only for Pending vendors), mandatory rejection reason input, vendor status update to Rejected, confirmation button deactivation without reason, keyboard accessibility, and end-to-end rejection flow.

inScope: Reject button visibility only on Pending vendor cards/details
Reject button not visible for Active, Inactive, or Rejected vendors
Confirmation button deactivated when no reason is provided
Rejection action — vendor status changes to Rejected
Vendor moves from Pending Approval tab to Rejected Partners tab
Accessibility of Reject button and reason input
outOfScope: Vendor notification delivery mechanism (backend email service)
Vendor edit/resubmission UI details (vendor portal side)
Vendor list and tab functionality (covered by SCRUM-469)
Vendor notification with rejection reason (requires vendor portal access)
Vendor resubmission flow (requires vendor portal access)

relatedStories: SCRUM-469 - View Vendor Lists by Status (tab movement after rejection)
SCRUM-475 - View Vendor Details (Reject button context)
SCRUM-478 - Approve Vendor Application (re-approval after resubmission)

prerequisites: Admin is signed in to the Admin Portal
At least two vendors in Pending Approval status
Active, Inactive, and Rejected vendors exist for negative testing

testCases.title: Verify Reject button is visible for Pending vendors
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Reject button visible only for Pending vendors
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Pending Approval tab with pending vendors
steps: Navigate to the vendor list page
Click the Pending Approval tab
Locate a pending vendor card or open View Details
Verify a Reject button is visible
expectedResults: Reject button is visible and clearly labeled
testCases.postconditions: Reject button is accessible for pending vendors

testCases.title: Verify Reject button is NOT visible for Active vendors
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Reject button visible only for Pending vendors
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Active Partners tab
steps: Click the Active Partners tab
Locate an active vendor card or open View Details
Verify no Reject button is present
testCases.postconditions: Reject button is hidden for active vendors

testCases.title: Verify Reject button is NOT visible for Inactive vendors
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Reject button visible only for Pending vendors
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Inactive Partners tab
steps: Click the Inactive Partners tab
Locate an inactive vendor card or open View Details
Verify no Reject button is present
testCases.postconditions: Reject button is hidden for inactive vendors

testCases.title: Verify Reject button is NOT visible for already Rejected vendors
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Reject button visible only for Pending vendors
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Rejected Partners tab
steps: Click the Rejected Partners tab
Locate a rejected vendor card or open View Details
Verify no Reject button is present
testCases.postconditions: Reject button is hidden for rejected vendors

testCases.title: Verify clicking Reject opens a rejection reason input
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC2 - Admin must provide a rejection reason
testCases.preconditions: Admin is viewing a pending vendor
steps: Click the Reject button for a pending vendor
Verify a rejection reason input field or dialog appears
Verify the input field is empty by default
Verify a confirmation/submit button is present
expectedResults: A rejection reason text area or dialog is displayed
A confirmation button (e.g., 'Confirm Rejection') is present

testCases.title: Verify confirmation button is deactivated when no rejection reason is provided
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: Edge Case - Rejection without reason → Confirmation button deactivated
testCases.preconditions: Admin has clicked Reject and the reason input is displayed
steps: Click the Reject button for a pending vendor
Leave the rejection reason field empty
Observe the confirmation button state
Verify the confirmation button is disabled or not clickable
expectedResults: Confirmation button is disabled/grayed out and cannot be clicked
testCases.postconditions: Rejection is blocked without a reason

testCases.title: Verify confirmation button becomes active after entering a rejection reason
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC2 - Admin must provide a rejection reason; Edge Case - Button activation
testCases.preconditions: Admin has clicked Reject and the reason input is displayed with empty field
steps: Verify the confirmation button is initially disabled
Enter a rejection reason in the text field
Observe the confirmation button state
Verify the confirmation button becomes enabled
expectedResults: Confirmation button is now enabled and clickable
testCases.postconditions: Confirmation button is active with reason provided
testCases.failureReason: SSO session dropped during tab switch

testCases.title: Verify vendor status changes to Rejected after confirmed rejection
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC4 - Vendor status updates to Rejected
testCases.preconditions: Admin is viewing a pending vendor and rejection reason input is displayed
steps: Enter a rejection reason
Click the confirmation button to reject
Verify the vendor status changes to Rejected

testCases.title: Verify rejected vendor moves from Pending Approval to Rejected Partners tab
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC4 - Vendor status updates to Rejected (removed from pending)
testCases.preconditions: A vendor has just been rejected
steps: After rejecting a vendor, observe the Pending Approval tab
Verify the rejected vendor is no longer in the Pending Approval tab
Click the Rejected Partners tab
Verify the rejected vendor now appears in the Rejected Partners tab
expectedResults: Rejected vendor is removed from Pending Approval tab
Rejected vendor is now listed in Rejected Partners tab
testCases.postconditions: Vendor has moved to Rejected Partners tab

testCases.title: Verify Reject button and reason input are accessible via keyboard
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Pending Approval tab
steps: Use Tab key to navigate to the Reject button
Press Enter or Space to activate the Reject button
Verify the rejection reason input appears
Tab to the reason text field and type a reason
Tab to the confirmation button
Verify the confirmation button is reachable and activatable via keyboard
expectedResults: Reject button is reachable via Tab
Reason can be typed via keyboard
Confirmation button is reachable via Tab
Confirmation button can be activated via Enter/Space
testCases.postconditions: Rejection flow is fully keyboard accessible

testCases.title: Verify complete Reject Vendor flow end-to-end
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1-AC4 and Edge Cases - Complete Flow
testCases.preconditions: Admin is signed in and a pending vendor exists
steps: Navigate to the Pending Approval tab
Note the pending vendor name and tab counts
Verify Reject button is visible
Click Reject
Verify confirmation button is disabled without reason
Enter a rejection reason
Verify confirmation button becomes enabled
Click confirm to reject
Verify vendor is removed from Pending Approval tab
Verify Pending count decreased by 1
Click Rejected Partners tab
Verify the vendor appears in Rejected Partners tab
Verify Rejected count increased by 1
expectedResults: Vendor name and counts are noted
Vendor is removed from Pending tab
Vendor appears in Rejected Partners tab
testCases.postconditions: Full rejection flow is verified end-to-end
testCases.failureReason: Dialog overlay from previous test blocks View Details click in E2E flow

vendorAccounts: At least 2 vendors in Pending Approval status
At least 1 vendor in Active status (for negative button visibility test)
At least 1 vendor in Inactive status (for negative button visibility test)
At least 1 vendor in Rejected status (for negative button visibility test)
rejectionReasons: Empty input for button deactivation testing

assumptions: Admin Portal is accessible and admin sign-in works (SCRUM-442)
Vendor list with status tabs is available (SCRUM-469)
Reject button is accessible from vendor card or View Details modal (or both)
risks: Vendor resubmission flow depends on vendor portal implementation which may be a separate story
Notification delivery verification depends on email service availability
Rejection reason field character limit is not specified
Whether rejection reason is stored and visible in vendor details after rejection is not specified
Resubmission rules (how many times, cooldown period) are not defined
openQuestions: Is there a character limit for the rejection reason text field?
Is the rejection reason visible in the vendor details after rejection (for admin reference)?
How many times can a vendor resubmit after rejection?
Is there a cooldown period between rejection and resubmission?
Where is the Reject button located — on the vendor card, in the View Details modal, or both?
Does the rejection dialog have a Cancel button to dismiss without rejecting?
Is the rejection reason stored as an audit trail for future reference?
notesFromChangelog: Description has been stable since 2026-02-10. No recent changes to acceptance criteria or edge cases.
